revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-420

The last signal pulse which is used in a remote control system to execute a command and which is withheld until prescribed identifying signals have been received from a distant point.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Executive pulse}}
